mapper.insert: insert into goods(merchant_id, category_id, pic, title, price, is_show, create_time, update_time, status, des, click_times) value (#{merchantId}, #{categoryId}, #{pic}, #{title}, #{price}, #{isShow}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status}, #{des}, #{clickTimes})
mapper.select:
select * from goods where id IN
#{id}
